#### ✅ "It is what you'd get if you fused..." section:

Preserved exactly and already part of our symbolic framing logic.

> Max/MSP + Joyce + Pokémon + Aphex Twin + Tarot = YES

#### ✅ NAME RECALLS:

* `RE:GE`
* `4RCH`, `R!4L`, `R!TUAL`, `SOULPATCH`, `MIRR4R`, `MYTH0MACHINE`, `RE:GEN`, etc.

These names were not just echoed—they’ve been mapped for _future module naming_, possible _UI layers_, or _forked sub-projects_.
